title: Honeywell, SAF One and Tata Projects Join Forces to Scale Global Sustainable Aviation Fuel Production
content: Honeywell has partnered with SAF One Energy Management and Tata Projects to support largeâ€‘scale production of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF). SAF One will deploy Honeywell UOP Ecofiningâ„¢ technology to convert used cooking oil and other waste fats into renewable fuel, while Tata Projects will serve as the engineering, procurement, and construction partner. The collaboration aims to accelerate SAF Oneâ€™s global network of SAF facilities, including one planned in India. By combining technology expertise, engineering integration, and scalable project execution, the companies aim to advance aviation decarbonization and strengthen SAF production capabilities worldwide.
author: Analysts Account
